gaps.msg: n03 has no 3D model — tube fatigue and clamp point analysis based on estimated routing; vibration O scores may be underestimated
gaps.assumption: Tube routing from CTS PPTX estimated; actual bend radii and clamp locations unknown

assumptions.rationale: No 3D model available; tube lengths and bend radii estimated; fatigue O scores conservative
Damper internal design data not available; scoring based on supplier reputation and industry practice
COMP-04 has no detailed dimensions; connector type inferred from CTS PPTX
O-ring groove and cross-section dimensions not in n03; assumed per PF.90298 standard practice

failure_modes.function: Transport fuel from filter to damper via PA12 tube (8x6mm) at 4.5 bar WP
failure_modes.failure_cause: Material defect or wall thickness below spec
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Material certification + incoming inspection
failure_modes.recommended_action: Safety-critical (S=10): maintain current controls; ensure 100% traceability and control plan coverage

failure_modes.function: Transport fuel from filter to damper via PA12 tube (8x6mm) at 4.5 bar WP
failure_modes.failure_cause: Poor joint geometry or surface finish
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Dimensional control on OD/ID
failure_modes.recommended_action: Implement design change or additional prevention control to reduce O from 4; review with engineering team

failure_modes.function: Transport fuel from filter to damper via PA12 tube (8x6mm) at 4.5 bar WP
failure_modes.failure_effect: Loss of fuel flow → engine stall
failure_modes.failure_cause: Foreign material or internal collapse
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Cleanliness spec + process control

failure_modes.function: Transport fuel from filter to damper via PA12 tube (8x6mm) at 4.5 bar WP
failure_modes.failure_cause: Vibration fatigue at bend radius or clamp point
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: FEA validation of bend radius and clamp spacing
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add design verification test or redundant detection method to reduce D from 5; validate with DV/PV test program

failure_modes.function: Transport fuel from filter to damper via PA12 tube (8x6mm) at 4.5 bar WP
failure_modes.failure_cause: PA12 permeation rate exceeds spec at elevated temp
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Material qualification per SAE J2260
failure_modes.recommended_action: RPN=120 exceeds threshold: review prevention and detection controls; consider SPC or additional end-of-line test

failure_modes.function: Transport fuel from filter to damper via PA12 tube (8x6mm) at 4.5 bar WP
failure_modes.failure_cause: Fuel chemistry or external road salt environment
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: PA12 material inherently corrosion resistant; external sleeve

failure_modes.function: Connect feed line to fuel filter via QC 90-degree fitting (5/16 inch)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Insufficient retention force or vibration loosening
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Retention force spec >=450N per PF.90298 + design verification
failure_modes.recommended_action: Safety-critical (S=10): maintain current controls; ensure 100% traceability and control plan coverage

failure_modes.function: Connect feed line to fuel filter via QC 90-degree fitting (5/16 inch)
failure_modes.failure_cause: O-ring damage, wrong size, or FKM degradation
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Dual O-ring design (FKM+FVMQ) + material qualification
failure_modes.recommended_action: Safety-critical (S=10): maintain current controls; ensure 100% traceability and control plan coverage

failure_modes.function: Connect feed line to fuel filter via QC 90-degree fitting (5/16 inch)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Operator fails to achieve full QC engagement
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Poka-yoke: audible click + secondary latch per PF.90298
failure_modes.recommended_action: Implement design change or additional prevention control to reduce O from 4; review with engineering team

failure_modes.function: Connect feed line to fuel filter via QC 90-degree fitting (5/16 inch)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Stone impact or handling damage
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Material impact resistance spec >=50J at -30C
failure_modes.current_control_detection: Impact test at DV/PV per PF.90298
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add design verification test or redundant detection method to reduce D from 5; validate with DV/PV test program

failure_modes.function: Connect feed line to fuel filter via QC 90-degree fitting (5/16 inch)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Latch spring fatigue or plastic creep after 30 cycles
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Latch force retention spec + PA66-GF material

failure_modes.function: Attenuate fuel pressure pulsation to reduce NVH (Nobel Auto damper, WP 4.5 bar)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Loss of damping → pressure pulsation → NVH
failure_modes.failure_cause: Diaphragm or piston seal failure
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Damper design qualification (Nobel Auto) + seal material

failure_modes.function: Attenuate fuel pressure pulsation to reduce NVH (Nobel Auto damper, WP 4.5 bar)
failure_modes.failure_effect: NVH complaint → subjective rating <8 / downstream fatigue
failure_modes.failure_cause: Gas charge loss or spring fatigue
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Design life calculation for 15yr/150k miles + gas charge spec

failure_modes.function: Attenuate fuel pressure pulsation to reduce NVH (Nobel Auto damper, WP 4.5 bar)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Pressure cycling beyond design life (300k/600k cycles)
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Fatigue analysis + safety factor per PF.90197
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add design verification test or redundant detection method to reduce D from 5; validate with DV/PV test program

failure_modes.function: Protect tubes from abrasion at vehicle body contact points (braided sleeve Type B)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Exposed tube → abrasion damage → eventual leak
failure_modes.failure_cause: Omitted during assembly or fell off in transit
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Assembly checklist + poka-yoke fixture
failure_modes.recommended_action: RPN=196 exceeds threshold: review prevention and detection controls; consider SPC or additional end-of-line test

failure_modes.function: Protect tubes from abrasion at vehicle body contact points (braided sleeve Type B)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Protection ineffective → tube exposed to chafing
failure_modes.failure_cause: Handling force exceeds sleeve/cap rating
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Handling instruction + packaging spec

failure_modes.function: Seal open ports during transport/storage to prevent contamination
failure_modes.failure_effect: Exposed tube → abrasion damage → eventual leak
failure_modes.failure_cause: Omitted during assembly or fell off in transit
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Assembly checklist + poka-yoke fixture
failure_modes.recommended_action: RPN=196 exceeds threshold: review prevention and detection controls; consider SPC or additional end-of-line test

failure_modes.function: Seal open ports during transport/storage to prevent contamination
failure_modes.failure_effect: Protection ineffective → tube exposed to chafing
failure_modes.failure_cause: Handling force exceeds sleeve/cap rating
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Handling instruction + packaging spec

failure_modes.function: Retain and route tube assembly on vehicle underbody/engine bay mounting points
failure_modes.failure_effect: Tube shift → chafing against body → eventual leak
failure_modes.failure_cause: Insufficient clamp force or resonance
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Clamp force spec (removal >=100N) + FEA modal analysis
failure_modes.recommended_action: RPN=140 exceeds threshold: review prevention and detection controls; consider SPC or additional end-of-line test

failure_modes.function: Retain and route tube assembly on vehicle underbody/engine bay mounting points
failure_modes.failure_effect: Tube unsupported → contact with hot/sharp surfaces
failure_modes.failure_cause: Nylon fatigue, overtightening, or UV degradation
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Material selection (nylon, UV stabilized) + insertion force <=40N
failure_modes.recommended_action: RPN=105 exceeds threshold: review prevention and detection controls; consider SPC or additional end-of-line test

failure_modes.function: Retain and route tube assembly on vehicle underbody/engine bay mounting points
failure_modes.failure_cause: Clearance between clip and tube OD
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Interference fit design matched to tube OD

failure_modes.function: Seal fuel at QC connector interfaces using dual FKM+FVMQ O-ring system
failure_modes.failure_effect: Seal leak → fuel loss → fire risk
failure_modes.failure_cause: FKM/FVMQ degradation from heat (115C short-term) or fuel exposure
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Material qualification per PF.90298 fluid+temp range
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add design verification test or redundant detection method to reduce D from 5; validate with DV/PV test program

failure_modes.function: Seal fuel at QC connector interfaces using dual FKM+FVMQ O-ring system
failure_modes.failure_cause: Incompatible fuel blend or bio-fuel content change
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Fluid compatibility test (CE10, CM15) during material selection
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add design verification test or redundant detection method to reduce D from 5; validate with DV/PV test program

failure_modes.function: Seal fuel at QC connector interfaces using dual FKM+FVMQ O-ring system
failure_modes.failure_cause: Nick or cut during assembly; sharp edge on spigot groove
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Edge break spec on spigot + assembly tool design
failure_modes.recommended_action: Implement design change or additional prevention control to reduce O from 4; review with engineering team

failure_modes.function: Seal fuel at QC connector interfaces using dual FKM+FVMQ O-ring system
failure_modes.failure_effect: Seal material enters flow path → leak
failure_modes.failure_cause: Gap too large or pressure exceeds O-ring rating at elevated temp
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Groove design review per O-ring handbook + PF.90298
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add design verification test or redundant detection method to reduce D from 5; validate with DV/PV test program

failure_modes.function: Provide sealed quick-connect joint between feed tube (COMP-01) and filter-side connector (COMP-03)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Insufficient retention (<450N) or vibration loosening
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Retention force spec >=450N per PF.90298 + secondary latch
failure_modes.recommended_action: Safety-critical (S=10): maintain current controls; ensure control plan coverage

failure_modes.function: Provide sealed quick-connect joint between feed tube (COMP-01) and filter-side connector (COMP-03)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Operator fails to achieve full engagement, no click
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Poka-yoke: audible click + secondary latch per PF.90298
failure_modes.current_control_detection: Automated latch verification or visual audit
failure_modes.recommended_action: Implement additional prevention control to reduce O from 4; review assembly process

failure_modes.function: Provide sealed quick-connect joint between feed tube (COMP-01) and filter-side connector (COMP-03)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Reduced retention safety margin → potential pull-apart
failure_modes.failure_cause: Latch not engaged due to assembly sequence error
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Color coding + two-step assembly instruction per PF.90298 §1.8
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add verification test or redundant detection to reduce D from 4; include in DV/PV program

failure_modes.function: Provide sealed quick-connect joint between return tube (COMP-02) and engine-side connector (COMP-04) with secondary latch
failure_modes.failure_cause: Insufficient retention (<450N) or vibration loosening
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Retention force spec >=450N per PF.90298 + secondary latch
failure_modes.recommended_action: Safety-critical (S=10): maintain current controls; ensure control plan coverage

failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Color coding + two-step assembly instruction per PF.90298 §1.8
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add verification test or redundant detection to reduce D from 4; include in DV/PV program

failure_modes.function: Provide sealed press-fit/crimp joint between feed tube (COMP-01) and damper inlet (COMP-05)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Interference too low or vibration exceeds design
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Interference fit tolerance spec + FEA
failure_modes.recommended_action: Add verification test or redundant detection to reduce D from 4; include in DV/PV program

failure_modes.failure_cause: Fretting corrosion or thermal cycling -40/+115C

failure_modes.failure_cause: Interference too low or vibration exceeds design

failure_modes.function: Retain tube assembly on vehicle body via clip mounting points (COMP-08)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Tube shift → chafing against body → eventual leak
failure_modes.failure_cause: Insufficient clip retention force (<100N)
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Retention force spec >=100N + vibration analysis
failure_modes.recommended_action: RPN=140: review prevention and detection; consider adding SPC or test

failure_modes.function: Retain tube assembly on vehicle body via clip mounting points (COMP-08)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Fatigue failure of clip or tube at mount point
failure_modes.failure_cause: Natural frequency within vehicle excitation 10-500Hz
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: FEA modal analysis of tube+clip system

failure_modes.function: Provide fuel-tight seal at QC connector interfaces via dual O-ring system (COMP-03, COMP-04, COMP-09)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Fuel leak → fire or emission non-compliance
failure_modes.failure_cause: Surface finish or flatness out of spec on spigot/housing
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Surface finish spec on mating surfaces per PF.90298
failure_modes.recommended_action: Safety-critical (S=10): maintain current controls; ensure control plan coverage

failure_modes.function: Provide fuel-tight seal at QC connector interfaces via dual O-ring system (COMP-03, COMP-04, COMP-09)
failure_modes.failure_effect: Immediate fuel leak at QC joint
failure_modes.failure_cause: Sharp edge on spigot, misalignment, or excessive insertion force
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Edge break spec + assembly force limit <=67N per PF.90298
failure_modes.recommended_action: Implement additional prevention control to reduce O from 4; review assembly process

failure_modes.function: Maintain Leak-tightness (SC) within specification
failure_modes.failure_effect: Potential safety or performance impact (SC/CC characteristic)
failure_modes.failure_cause: Process variation or design inadequacy
failure_modes.current_control_prevention: Design spec + process control
failure_modes.recommended_action: Ensure Leak-tightness (SC) is included in control plan with SPC or 100% inspection

dfmea_corrections.rationale: DFMEA FM-005 identified risk not covered by existing DRG indicators: Permeation (S=6, RPN=120)
DFMEA FM-011 identified risk not covered by existing DRG indicators: Permeation (S=6, RPN=120)
